title: Training Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Training Techniques inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Databricks
steps.summary: Databricks belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Representation Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with Databricks MosaicML and kl divergence. It opens into Databricks MosaicML and Databricks Feature Engineering.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: kl divergence
steps.summary: kl divergence belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Representation Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with js divergence and Divergence Minimization. It opens into KL divergence loss and Kullback-Leibler Divergence (KL).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Divergence Minimization
steps.summary: Divergence Minimization belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Representation Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with kl divergence and js divergence. It opens into Divergence Minimization Techniques and Divergence Minimization Techniques Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Extraction (model stealing)
steps.summary: Extraction (model stealing) belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Representation Learning / Training Techniques. Start after Model Stealing.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Databricks MosaicML
steps.summary: Databricks MosaicML belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Representation Learning / Training Techniques. Start after Databricks.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Jensen-Shannon Divergence (JSD)
steps.summary: Jensen-Shannon Divergence (JSD) belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Representation Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with kl divergence and js divergence.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: js divergence
steps.summary: js divergence belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Representation Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with kl divergence and Divergence Minimization.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Divergence Measures
steps.summary: Divergence Measures belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Representation Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with kl divergence and js divergence.
